headline: Mizuho Lowers Allstate (ALL) Price Target to $265
summary: The Allstate Corporation (NYSE:ALL) is one of the 15 Set-It-and-Forget-It Stocks to Buy in 2026. On March 20, 2026, Mizuho lowered the price target on The Allstate Corporation (NYSE:ALL) from $281 to $265 and kept an Outperform rating on the stock. Prior to this, on March 19, 2026, The Allstate Corporation (NYSE:ALL) announced estimated catastrophe […]
